subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath raised its cry in praise of God, the Lord of Names, and beareth witness unto that which the Tongue of Eternity hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع صریر القلم الاعلی فی ذکر الله مالک الاسماء و یشهد بما شهد لسان القدم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
